description_long: This is an adult male figure with a full beard and long hair, dressed in a formal outfit that includes a tailored jacket, collared shirt, and fitted trousers. The figure's posture is upright, with arms slightly extended away from the body and legs straight. The clothing appears to be a mix of classic and modern styles, with the jacket featuring structured shoulders and the trousers having a slim fit. The shoes are formal, likely dress shoes, complementing the overall business or formal attire. The facial features are partially obscured by the beard and hairstyle, but the figure exudes a composed and professional demeanor. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A bearded adult male in formal attire, including a tailored jacket, collared shirt, fitted trousers, and dress shoes, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full beard, long hair, formal jacket, collared shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the long hair, beard, and the fitted nature of the jacket and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back of the jacket, straight legs, and the back of the head and hair visible.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the facial profile, beard, and the tailored fit of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: formal suit with tailored jacket, collared shirt, and fitted trousers
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair with full beard
